labels.name: audit-sample
labels.description: PR selected for ADR-0044 post-merge audit sampling.

labels.name: large-pr
labels.description: Non-human-authored PR exceeds ADR-0044 size guidance and needs review attention.

labels.name: out-of-band
labels.description: Out-of-band PR without packet scope context; review runs with reduced scope.

labels.name: skip-review
labels.description: Manual ADR-0044 escape hatch; Grid Review Runner skips PRs carrying this label.

labels.name: needs-agent-review
labels.description: PR is in the Grid Review Runner queue; the pull-based local worker will pick it up on its next tick.

labels.name: agent-review-in-progress
labels.description: Local worker has claimed the PR and is running the Grid review.

labels.name: agent-reviewed
labels.description: Local worker posted a clean Grid review verdict.

labels.name: changes-requested-by-agent
labels.description: Local worker posted a Grid review verdict with blocking or request-changes findings.

labels.name: meta
labels.description: Architecture, governance, catalog, or process work.

labels.name: docs
labels.description: Documentation-only or documentation-primary changes.

labels.name: ci
labels.description: GitHub Actions, build, release, or workflow changes.

labels.name: bug
labels.description: Defect fix.

labels.name: enhancement
labels.description: Product or capability improvement.

labels.name: dependencies
labels.description: Package, tool, SDK, or dependency update.

labels.name: chore
labels.description: Maintenance work that is not a feature, bug, or refactor.

labels.name: security
labels.description: Security-sensitive code, configuration, or process changes.

labels.name: breaking-change
labels.description: Public API, schema, workflow contract, or behavior change requiring consumer action.

labels.name: refactor
labels.description: Behavior-preserving structural change.

labels.name: test
labels.description: Test-only or test-infrastructure change.

labels.name: infra
labels.description: GitHub Apps, Vault, Azure, local worker, Task Scheduler, or deployment plumbing.

labels.name: automation
labels.description: Agent, bot, scheduled-runner, or automated workflow behavior.

labels.name: human-only
labels.description: Work requiring manual portal, account, or operator action.

labels.name: blocked
labels.description: Work cannot proceed until an external or manual prerequisite clears.

labels.name: superseded
labels.description: Issue, packet, or PR replaced by newer scoped work.

labels.name: new-node
labels.description: New Grid Node or repository standup work.

labels.name: catalog
labels.description: Architecture catalog or index changes.

labels.name: contracts
labels.description: Public abstractions, API contracts, or compatibility surface.

labels.name: scaffolding
labels.description: Initial repository, Node, or project setup.
